pages.text: An upgraded hearth crafted through necromantic authority. When placed, within a 32-block radius:$(br)$(li)Undead creatures become neutral to players (effective only on non-boss units)$(li)Player-aligned units continuously gain Fire Resistance and Regeneration I, with 25% increased damage dealt and 25% reduced damage taken$(br)Cooking speed becomes 4x normal at night, and 2x during daytime.
